# netbox_asn (Resource)

Manages a NetBox ASN (Autonomous System Number).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create an ASN manually
resource "netbox_asn" "example" {
  asn         = 64512
  rir         = netbox_rir.example.id
  tenant      = netbox_tenant.example.id
  description = "Example ASN"

  tags = [
    {
      name = "production"
      slug = "production"
    }
  ]
}

# Create an ASN range for auto-allocation
resource "netbox_asn_range" "private" {
  name        = "Private ASN Range"
  slug        = "private-asn-range"
  start       = 64512
  end         = 65534
  rir         = netbox_rir.example.id
  description = "Private ASN range for auto-allocation"
}

# Auto-assign ASN from range
resource "netbox_asn" "auto_allocated" {
  autoassign          = true
  parent_asn_range_id = netbox_asn_range.private.id
  rir                 = netbox_rir.example.id
  tenant              = netbox_tenant.example.id
  description         = "Auto-allocated from range"

  tags = [
    {
      name = "auto-assigned"
      slug = "auto-assigned"
    }
  ]
}

# Auto-assign with upsert: reuse existing ASN with same tenant/tags if found
resource "netbox_asn" "auto_with_upsert" {
  autoassign          = true
  upsert              = true
  parent_asn_range_id = netbox_asn_range.private.id
  rir                 = netbox_rir.example.id
  tenant              = netbox_tenant.example.id
  description         = "Will reuse existing ASN if found"

  tags = [
    {
      name = "reusable"
      slug = "reusable"
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `asn` (Number) Autonomous System Number. Optional when autoassign is true.
- `autoassign` (Boolean) If true, automatically allocate an ASN from parent_asn_range_id. Requires parent_asn_range_id.
- `comments` (String) Additional comments.
- `description` (String) Description of the ASN.
- `parent_asn_range_id` (Number) Parent ASN range ID to allocate from when autoassign is true.
- `rir` (Number) RIR ID that allocated this ASN.
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags associated with this ASN. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `tenant` (Number) Tenant ID that owns this ASN.
- `upsert` (Boolean) If true, will find and use existing ASN with matching number instead of creating a new one.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) NetBox internal ID.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `name` (String) Tag name.
- `slug` (String) Tag slug.
